case_title: SINDELL JON S VS COHN BERNARD S

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINDELL JON S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COHN BERNARD S $579.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $624.00, DEFENDANT TO RETURN ANY LEGAL MATERIALS TO PLAINTIFF WHICH BELONG TO PLAINTIFF AND WHICH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COHN BERNARD S
